full_text:
Zhang Yan (Gongwei) 張延 (公威)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Yan (張延), styledGongwei (公威), was born in Xiuwu county, Henei commandery. May have paid for rank, Zhang Yan was slandered by the eunuchs and died in jail. Zhang Yan was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Zhang Yan lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
